nasb.text: and there were in it all kinds of four-footed animals and crawling creatures of the earth and birds of the air.

esv.text: In it were all kinds of animals and reptiles and birds of the air.

cnv.text: 裡面有地上的各樣四足牲畜，還有昆蟲和天空的飛鳥。

ccb.text: 里面有各种天上的飞禽、地上的爬虫和四足的走兽。

csbs.text: 里面有地上的各种四足动物、野兽、爬行动物和天空的飞鸟。
